svg.text: Luồng Redis Pub/Sub — Agent → Redis → WebSocket → Frontend
① PUBLISH PATH (Agent → EventPublisher → Redis → EventConsumer → WS Handler → Frontend)
{ id, task_id, agent_run_id, event_type, content, sequence_number, timestamp }
(one channel per task, per agent run)
② CATCH-UP PATH (Frontend → WS Handler → PostgreSQL → replay to client)
③ CONTROL PATH (Frontend → PAUSE / RESUME → PauseService → Redis SET flag → Agent checks)
